steps.title: Substitute the point (3331, 433) into the function equation
Solve for the constant a
steps.content:
Subtract $433$ from both sides:
$$\frac{1}{7}(3331-a)=0$$
Multiply by $7$: $$3331-a=0$$
So $a=3331$. Desmos can also calculate the given points against the model and returns the same constant. The answer is 3331.
